summary: Tested Collection Manager custom description feature. All tests PASSED: Backend APIs (GET/PUT custom_description) work correctly, Frontend UI (textarea, Save, Clear buttons, Desc badge) works correctly, persistence verified across page refresh.
critical_code_review_comments: CollectionCard component (lines 638-894) correctly implements description editor with data-testid attributes for testing
handleUpdateSettings function (lines 171-190) properly sends PUT request with custom_description
Backend PUT endpoint (lines 2291-2320) correctly handles custom_description field with upsert
Backend GET endpoint (lines 2154-2285) correctly returns custom_description from collection_settings
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Monaco Polished collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collection Manager custom description feature VERIFIED: 1) Show details link expands to reveal Custom Description textarea, 2) Typing enables Save button, 3) Save sends PUT to /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name}, 4) Description persists after page refresh, 5) Clear button clears description, 6) Purple 'Desc' badge appears on cards with custom descriptions, 7) Green confirmation text 'Description saved and live on storefront' shows after save.

1_collection_manager_loads.details: Collection Manager page loads with 445 collection cards in Grid view

2_show_details_expands.details: Clicking 'Show details' reveals Custom Description textarea, Save button, and Price Range

3_typing_enables_save.details: Typing in textarea enables Save button (disabled when no changes)

4_save_sends_put_request.details: Clicking Save sends PUT to /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name} with custom_description

5_description_persists.details: Description persists after page refresh - verified via UI and backend API

6_clear_button_works.details: Clear button appears when description exists and clears the description

7_desc_badge_shows.details: Purple 'Desc' badge appears on collection cards with saved custom descriptions

8_backend_get_returns_custom_description.details: GET /api/website-admin/collections returns custom_description field for each collection

9_backend_put_saves_custom_description.details: PUT /api/website-admin/collections/{series_name} with custom_description saves to DB
